zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan ap Evan於大約1380年出生在威爾士時，她的父親Evan Ap Evan or Gethin28歲，母親Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin24歲。她於1402年與Howell Ap Grono Vachan在威爾士格拉莫爾根結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan ap Evan于大约1380年出生在威尔士时，她的父亲Evan Ap Evan or Gethin28岁，母亲Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin24岁。她于1402年与Howell Ap Grono Vachan在威尔士格拉莫爾根结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Evan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (southern): from the personal name Evan, itself from Ieuan, a Welsh derivative of Latin Johannes (English John). See Evans .

variants.name: Bevan
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Iefan ‘son of Evan’, with fused patronymic marker (a)p. Compare Evan and Evans .

variants.name: Heaven
meanings: Irish (Tipperary): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEimhín ‘descendant of Eimhín’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of éimh ‘swift’, ‘prompt, ready’.

variants.name: Haven
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) harbor’, from Middle English haven (Old English hæfen ‘haven’).
Dutch: variant of Haveman , or possibly a topographic name from haven ‘port, harbour’. See also De Haven .

variants.name: Evans
meanings: Welsh: derivative of Evan , from Efan, Ifan, medieval forms of Ieuan (from Latin Johannes, the source of English John), dating from c. 1500, with the post-medieval patronymic suffix -s. Welsh Sion was a separate borrowing of English John, and Evan (Ieuan) and Sion developed as independent names.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan ap Evan was born about 1380, in Wales, her father, Evan Ap Evan or Gethin, was 28 and her mother, Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin, was 24. She married Howell Ap Grono Vachan in 1402, in Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan ap Evan est née environ 1380, à Galles, son père, Evan Ap Evan or Gethin, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Howell Ap Grono Vachan en 1402, à Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan ap Evan um 1380 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Evan Ap Evan or Gethin 28 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin 24. Sie hat 1402 in Glamorgan, Wales Howell Ap Grono Vachan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan ap Evan è nata il circa 1380 nel Galles, sua padre, Evan Ap Evan or Gethin, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Howell Ap Grono Vachan nel 1402, nel Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan ap Evanが約1380年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Evan Ap Evan or Gethinは28歳，母Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethinは24歳であった。1402年にウェールズグラモーガンでHowell Ap Grono Vachanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan ap Evan(이)가 대략 1380년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Evan Ap Evan or Gethin(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1402년 웨일스 글램르건에서 Howell Ap Grono Vachan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan ap Evan nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Gales, seu pai, Evan Ap Evan or Gethin, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Howell Ap Grono Vachan em 1402, em Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan ap Evan родилась около 1380 г. в местности Уэльс, её отцу по имени Evan Ap Evan or Gethin было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Howell Ap Grono Vachan в 1402 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan ap Evan nació aproximadamente 1380, en Gales, su papá, Evan Ap Evan or Gethin, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mrs. Evan ap Evan or Gethin, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Howell Ap Grono Vachan en 1402, en Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija.
